name: Cheddar Stuffed Franks in Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the frankfurters almost lengthwise.
2. Mix together the pickle relish and mustard.
3. Cut the cheddar cheese into 12 strips measuring 4 1/2 inches long by 1/2 inch wide.
4. Place one strip of cheddar cheese and about 2 tablespoons of the relish mixture inside each frankfurter, then set aside.
5. Panbroil the bacon until it is partially cooked and still limp, then drain.
6. Starting at one end of a frankfurter, secure with a wooden pick, wrap around the bacon lengthwise.
7. Secure the other end of the wrapped frankfurter with another wooden pick.
8. Set the oven to broil and arrange the bacon-wrapped frankfurters on the rack with the tops 3 inches below the heat source.
9. Broil until the bacon is cooked, turning once.
10. Serve hot in the buns.
